name: sepolia_block_139_306_946
description: Sepolia tx 0xdb77b3b2... at block 139,306,946 (idx 1). Direct Stylus call (no proxy) on 0x344f40ca; the Stylus contract makes a CALL into Solidity 0x101f443b, which CALLs Solidity 0x66eeab70, which halts on the SSTORE reentrancy sentry (remaining ≤ 2300). Pre-fix arbreth refunded the leftover ~836 gas back to the caller (revm's halt(ReentrancySentryOOG) doesn't spend gas, while geth consumes all forwarded gas on non-Revert errors), producing gasUsed=189,960 vs canon 190,818 (Δ -858). The fix in stylus_call_trampoline's run_evm_bytecode path matches geth's evm.Call: only Revert preserves remaining gas; every other failure consumes the full forwarded amount. Locks gasUsed=190,818 = canon byte-for-byte.
